name: The Unhappy Girl
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>薄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>幸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>乙女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おとめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: While this card is in face-up Attack Position on the field, this card is not destroyed as a result of battle. (Damage calculation is applied normally.) A monster that battled with this card cannot change its battle position, except with a card effect, or attack while this card is in face-up Attack Position on the field.

A monster that battled with this card cannot change its battle position, except with a card effect, or attack while this card is in face-up Attack Position on the field.

attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
